meta.suspect_no_text_info_reason: 该页面包含导师详细的个人简介、研究方向、教育经历、代表性论文、科研项目及获奖等多项有效信息。

basic_info.name: 黄剑
basic_info.title: 教授
basic_info.department: 人工智能与自动化学院

biography.summary: 入选国家科技创新领军人才、教育部“新世纪优秀人才支持计划”，获湖北省自然科学基金杰出青年基金项目资助。曾任日本名古屋大学客座教授、法国巴黎第十二大学访问教授和日本学术振兴会资助的JSPS Fellow。
biography.academic_achievements: 主持国家自然科学基金重点类项目、科技部国际合作重点专项等国家级、省部级科研项目十余项。发表SCI期刊论文80余篇，SCI他引1000余次。获20件国家发明专利、1件美国发明专利和1件日本发明专利授权。担任《IEEE Transactions on Fuzzy Systems》等国际知名期刊编委。

academic_appointments.organization: 中国人工智能学会智能机器人专业委员会

education_background.major: 控制理论与控制工程专业

professional_experience.unit: 微纳米系统工程福田研究室

research_projects.title: 智能行走辅助机器人关键技术合作研究
research_projects.source: 国家重点研发计划政府间/港澳台重点专项项目

research_projects.title: 人机协同稳定约束的杖式助行机器人跌倒防护控制研究
research_projects.source: 国家自然科学基金面上项目

research_projects.title: 复杂可变形线性物体的机器人可靠动态操作研究
research_projects.source: 国家自然科学基金面上项目

research_projects.title: 机器人控制
research_projects.source: 教育部新世纪优秀人才支持计划项目

research_projects.title: 智能变电站电力巡检机器人研制与开发应用
research_projects.source: 湖北省技术创新专项（重大项目）

research_projects.title: 智能助行康复机器人运动控制关键技术研究

representative_publications: J. Huang, Z.-H. Guan, T. Matsuno, T. Fukuda and K. Sekiyama, “Sliding Mode Velocity Control of Mobile Wheeled Inverted Pendulum Systems,” IEEE Transactions on Robotics, vol.26, no. 4, pp. 750-758, Aug. 2010.

K. Wakita, J. Huang*, P. Di, K. Sekiyama and T. Fukuda, “Human-Walking-Intention-Based Motion Control of an Omnidirectional-Type Cane Robot,” IEEE/ASME Transactions on Mechatronics, vol. 18, no. 1, pp. 285-296, 2013

J. Huang, W. Huo, W. Xu, S. Mohammed, Y. Amirat, “Control of Upper-Limb Power-Assist Exoskeleton Using a Human-Robot Interface Based on Motion Intention Recognition,” IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, vol. 12, no. 4, pp. 1257-1270, 2015

J. Huang, S. Ri, L. Liu, Y. Wang, J. Kim and G. Pak, “Nonlinear Disturbance Observer-Based Dynamic Surface Control of Mobile Wheeled Inverted Pendulum,” IEEE Transactions on Control Systems Technology, vol. 23, no. 6, pp. 2400-2407, 2015
J. Huang, M.H. Ri, D. Wu, et al., “Interval Type-2 Fuzzy Logic Modeling and Control of a Mobile Two-Wheeled Inverted Pendulum,” IEEE Transactions on Fuzzy Systems, vol. 26, no. 4, pp. 2030-2038, 2018

J. Huang, F. Ding, T. Fukuda, T. Matsuno, “Modeling and Velocity Control for a Novel Narrow Vehicle Based on Mobile Wheeled Inverted Pendulum,” IEEE Transactions on Control System Technology, vol. 21, no. 5, pp. 1607-1617, 2013

J. Huang, S. Ri, T. Fukuda, Y. Wang, “A Disturbance Observer based Sliding Mode Control for a Class of Underactuated Robotic System with Mismatched Uncertainties,” IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, vol. 64, no. 6, pp. 2480-2487, 2019

J. Huang, X. Tu, J. He, “Design and Evaluation of the RUPERT Wearable Upper Extremity Exoskeleton Robot for Clinical and In-Home Therapies,” IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, vol. 46, no. 7, pp. 926-935, 2016

J. Huang, M. Zhang, S. Ri, C. Xiong, Z. Li, Y. Kang, “High-Order Disturbance Observer Based Sliding Mode Control for Mobile Wheeled Inverted Pendulum Systems,” IEEE Transactions on Industrial Electronics, vol. 67, no. 3, pp. 2030-2041, 2020

J. Huang, T. Fukuda and T. Matsuno, “Model-based Intelligent Fault Detection and Diagnosis for Mating Electric Connectors in Robotic Wiring Harness Assembly Systems,” IEEE/ASME Transactions on Mechatronics, vol. 13, no. 1, pp. 86-94, 2008
